race.comment: STEFFI ELECTRICA (4) capable filly who doesn't boast the best winning strike rate. Just under six weeks between runs when she stalked the speed for a courageous third over 1100m at Ipswich. Gets her chance here with the 3kg claimer aboard. Go close. ON HER WORD (11) tough old mare who will appreciate the class drop here. Fitter for two runs back and in the mix. DEVIOUS MIND (13) good effort last time when he finished just 2.25 lengths away in fifth over 1215m at this track. Can feature. CONSTELLATION (2) returns from a spell. Placed in a recent trial. Opened last campaign with a third at Lismore over 1110m. Has claims.
